# fpcloud_domain (Resource)

Manages a custom domain attached to a Fogpipe application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fpcloud_domain" "main" {
  app_id = fpcloud_app.web.id
  domain = "myapp.example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app_id` (String) The application ID to attach this domain to.
- `domain` (String) The custom domain name (e.g. app.example.com).

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The time the domain was created.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the domain.
- `status` (String) The current status of the domain.
- `tls_status` (String) The TLS certificate status for the domain.
